metadata.title: Example Project MCP Servers
metadata.description: MCP server configuration for development project with filesystem, git, and database access
metadata.author: Development Team

filesystem.description: Provides filesystem access for reading and writing files

git.description: Git repository operations and version control

github.description: GitHub API access for issues, PRs, and repository management

postgres.description: PostgreSQL database access for queries and schema inspection

brave-search.description: Web search capabilities using Brave Search API

fetch.description: HTTP fetch capabilities for retrieving web content

playwright.description: Browser automation and web scraping with Playwright

sqlite.description: SQLite database access for local data storage
